notes.summary: Replaced the Phase-0 homepage placeholder with production-ready bilingual homepage content, including trust messaging, service highlights, coverage details, FAQs, and stronger booking CTAs. Verified with a successful production build.

Replaced the generic service placeholder for the home-cleaning route with a production-ready bilingual service page including service metadata, JSON-LD, FAQs, CTAs, and Montreal-area coverage messaging. Verified with a successful production build.

Extended the shared service-detail template so the deep-cleaning route now serves production-ready bilingual EN/FR content with route-specific metadata, JSON-LD, FAQs, and booking CTAs while keeping other service routes in placeholder mode. Verified with a successful production build.

Extended the shared service-detail template so the commercial-cleaning route now serves production-ready bilingual EN/FR content with route-specific metadata, JSON-LD, FAQs, and commercial-service messaging while keeping unfinished service routes in placeholder mode. Verified with a successful production build.

Completed the bilingual maid-services page with route-specific metadata, structured data, FAQs, and recurring-household-support messaging. Removed a duplicate content block during verification and confirmed the final page set with a successful production build.

Extended the shared service-detail template so the airbnb-cleaning route now serves production-ready bilingual EN/FR content with route-specific metadata, JSON-LD, FAQs, and short-term-rental turnover messaging while keeping unfinished service routes in placeholder mode. Verified with a successful production build.

Extended the shared service-detail template so the office-cleaning route now serves production-ready bilingual EN/FR content with route-specific metadata, JSON-LD, FAQs, and office-workspace messaging while keeping unfinished service routes in placeholder mode. Verified with a successful production build.

Completed the bilingual window-cleaning page with route-specific metadata, structured data, FAQs, and presentation-focused residential/commercial messaging. Removed a duplicate office-cleaning block during verification and confirmed the final page set with a successful production build.

Completed the bilingual post-renovation-cleaning page with route-specific metadata, structured data, FAQs, and after-construction cleanup messaging. Removed a duplicate post-renovation block during verification and confirmed the final page set with a successful production build.

Replaced the pricing placeholder with a production-ready bilingual residential pricing page featuring localized metadata, pricing-guidance tiers, quote-framing copy, FAQs, and conversion CTAs. Verified with a successful production build.

Extended the bilingual pricing page so it now includes commercial pricing guidance with quote-framing tiers, business-focused pricing factors, commercial FAQs, and stronger conversion support without breaking the completed residential pricing experience. Verified with a successful production build.

Replaced the book-now placeholder with a production-ready bilingual interim conversion page that sets booking expectations honestly, guides users by service type, includes FAQs, and routes requests toward quote/contact actions without faking a live booking integration. Verified with a successful production build.

Replaced the about placeholder with a production-ready bilingual trust page covering Sparkling Stays positioning, service coverage, who the company serves, core working principles, and conversion CTAs. Verified with a successful production build.

Replaced the contact placeholder with a production-ready bilingual contact page using the approved Sparkling Stays phone and email, including service-area coverage, inquiry guidance, FAQs, and conversion CTAs. Verified with a successful production build.

Replaced the FAQ placeholder with a production-ready bilingual FAQ page aligned with the completed services, pricing, booking, and contact flows. Verified with a successful production build and completed Phase 1 core pages.

Started Phase 2 by replacing the areas index placeholder with a production-ready bilingual service-areas page and replacing the generic area route placeholder with a reusable bilingual local-area template featuring metadata, FAQs, and conversion CTAs. Verified with a successful production build.

Upgraded the Laval area page beyond the generic template with richer bilingual local messaging, Laval-specific FAQs, and stronger service-demand framing while preserving the reusable area-page architecture. Verified with a successful production build.

Refined the Brossard area page beyond the generic template with richer bilingual South Shore messaging tied to family homes, condo demand, office/commercial service, Quartier DIX30, and the REM corridor, plus more localized FAQs and stronger coverage framing while preserving the reusable area-page architecture. Verified with a successful production build.

Upgraded the Longueuil area page beyond the generic template with richer bilingual South Shore messaging, Longueuil-specific FAQs, and stronger local service framing while preserving the reusable area-page architecture. Verified with a successful production build.

Upgraded the Pointe-Claire area page beyond the generic template with richer bilingual West Island messaging, Pointe-Claire-specific FAQs, and stronger local service framing while preserving the reusable area-page architecture. Verified with a successful production build.

Upgraded the Kirkland area page beyond the generic template with richer bilingual West Island messaging, Kirkland-specific FAQs, and stronger local service framing while preserving the reusable area-page architecture. Verified with a successful production build.

Upgraded the Dollard-des-Ormeaux area page beyond the generic template with richer bilingual West Island messaging, DDO-specific FAQs, and stronger local service framing while preserving the reusable area-page architecture. Verified with a successful production build.

Upgraded the Pierrefonds area page beyond the generic template with richer bilingual West Island messaging, Pierrefonds-specific FAQs, and stronger local service framing while preserving the reusable area-page architecture. Verified with a successful production build.
Completed all 25 neighborhood pages (bilingual EN/FR), West Island hub page, area index, and area template. All 56 Phase 2 pages built and verified with successful production builds.

Locked redesign direction after user feedback: follow current Sparkling Stays layout first, Clean Panther as secondary inspiration, keep Sparkling Stays color palette, use video/image-led homepage, and avoid the previously rejected generic text-first design. See REDESIGN_HANDOFF.md for recovery context.

Rebuilt homepage around the current Sparkling Stays layout direction with a top utility bar, stronger nav, real local hero video, imported WP media assets, image-led service cards, richer trust/process sections, and a redesigned footer. Also fixed locale rendering by wrapping the app in NextIntlClientProvider.
